title: T-089 — cross-tenant SCIM ambiguity-guard test (>1 hash verifies → 401) (FT-029)
prompt:
# T-089 — cross-tenant SCIM ambiguity-guard test (>1 hash verifies → 401) (FT-029)

PRD: `docs/prd/00-FOUNDATION-PRD.md` — sections: §5.x, §8.x
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`
Original carry-forward ID: **FT-029** (from `_meta/audits/2026-05-07-foundation-final-carry-forward-backlog.md`)
Severity: **P1** (XS effort)

## Goal
Add a regression test that triggers the ambiguity-guard branch and asserts 401.

## Implementation contract
1. Seed two scim_tokens rows with the same argon2 hash (simulating the misconfig).
2. Send a SCIM request with the matching bearer.
3. Assert response is 401 with 'ambiguous_tenant'.

## Files (scope)
- packages/auth/src/scim/__tests__/ambiguity-guard.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given two scim_tokens rows verify the same bearer, when SCIM verifyToken runs, then it returns 401 'ambiguous_tenant'.
2. Given exactly one scim_tokens row verifies the bearer, when SCIM verifyToken runs, then it resolves to that tenant.

## Test strategy
- RED: write ambiguity-guard.test.ts asserting both ACs.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/auth test ambiguity-guard`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not pick the first matching tenant — always 401.
- Do not log the bearer plaintext.

## Closeout evidence
Provide: changed_files, test_commands_and_results, acceptance_criteria_status (per AC), deviations_from_prd, git_status. Use the test-driven-development skill (RED-first) and requesting-code-review at GREEN.

pipeline_inputs.description: Add SCIM cross-tenant ambiguity-guard test that asserts: if more than one tenant's scim_token_hash argon2-verifies the same bearer, the request returns 401.
pipeline_inputs.details: SCIM bearer tokens are argon2id-hashed per tenant. If a single bearer happens to verify against multiple tenants' hashes (e.g., due to a misconfigured token reuse), the verifier MUST return 401 instead of picking one. T-013 implemented this defensively; this task adds the regression test.
out_of_scope: Do not change SCIM Group provisioning (FT-031).
acceptance_criteria: Given two scim_tokens rows verify the same bearer, when SCIM verifyToken runs, then it returns 401 'ambiguous_tenant'.
Given exactly one scim_tokens row verifies the bearer, when SCIM verifyToken runs, then it resolves to that tenant.
test_strategy: RED: write ambiguity-guard.test.ts asserting both ACs.
risk_red_lines: Do not pick the first matching tenant — always 401.
Do not log the bearer plaintext.
